name: Applesauce Kugel (Pareve)
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Broad Egg Noodles, cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the melted margarine and granulated sugar.
3. Whisk in the beaten eggs until the mixture is light and frothy.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (applesauce, salt, cinnamon, vanilla extract) to the bowl, stirring continuously.
5. Fold in the cooked egg noodles, ensuring they are evenly distributed throughout the batter.
6. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 4-quart baking dish (10 x 12 inches).
7. Bake in the pre-heated oven for 1 hour.
8. Allow the kugel to cool completely before cutting it into portions.
9. Reheat the cooled kugel if desired before serving.
Freezes well.
